name: Gilbert Stephenson Park
description: Gilbert Stephenson Park is a place to play pickleball in Fort Oglethorpe, GA. There are 12 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like lights. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free.

name: Graysville Gym
description: Come play pickleball at Graysville Gym in Ringgold, GA! There is 1 indoor court. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. Players have access to lights.

name: Williams Pickleball Courts
description: Williams Pickleball Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Ringgold, GA. There are 10 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are not available. Players have access to lights, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, water, and restrooms. The courts are free.
